name: publish-skill
description: A topic-agnostic publication-ready writing skill that fact-checks claims, repairs logic, and rewrites drafts into a natural publication style without hallucinating evidence.
core_principles: Topic agnostic: never hard-code a subject domain into the workflow.
Facts before style: claims are mined and checked before rewriting.
No invented evidence: unknowns must be labelled, weakened, or removed.
Preserve the author's intent and judgement.
Make the final prose human, precise, and readable.
